column1: Supermemory learns and builds the memory for the user. These are extracted facts about the user, that: Evolve on top of existing context about the user, in real time Handle knowledge updates, temporal changes, forgetfulness Creates a user profile as the default context provider for the LLM. This can then be provided to the LLM, to give more contextual, personalized responses. User profiles Having the latest, evolving context about the user allows us to also create a User Profile. This is a combination of static and dynamic facts about the user, that the agent should
